title: 云端幻想图像场景创作
author: @NanoBanana_labs
prompt: 参考照片中的人（保持参考图像中人的面部100%准确）在天空上方蓬松发光的云朵上放松，周围是柔和的金色阳光和延伸到地平线的大片云层。这个人舒服地躺着，枕着枕头，穿着深色长袖衬衫，橄榄绿色裤子，戴着眼镜，一只手拿着书，另一只手里拿着咖啡杯。灯光是电影般的温暖，用明亮的亮点和柔和的阴影捕捉到了黄金时段的氛围。用广角镜头在中等景深下拍摄，在主体和周围梦幻般的天空之间平衡焦点。整体氛围超现实而宁静，在宁静、富有想象力的环境中融合了现实主义和幻想。
prompt_en: the person from the reference photo ( keep the face of the person 100% accurate from the reference image ) relaxing on a fluffy, glowing cloud high above the sky, surrounded by soft golden sunlight and vast layers of clouds stretching to the horizon. the person is lying back comfortably with a pillow, wearing a dark long-sleeve shirt, olive green pants, and glasses, holding a book in one hand and a coffee cup in the other. the lighting is cinematic and warm, capturing the golden hour ambiance with radiant highlights and gentle shadows across the clouds. captured with a wide-angle lens at medium depth of field, balancing focus between the subject and the surrounding dreamy sky. the overall atmosphere is surreal and serene, blending realism with fantasy in a peaceful, imaginative setting.

title: 2006年秋季周六时代广场的写实街景：聚焦金发女性与模糊人群
author: minchoi
prompt: 生成一张2006年秋季某个周六的时代广场的逼真图像。那天是十月末，天气非常美丽，人们都在忙碌着。画面中应该有一个年轻的金发女子，她的轮廓要清晰可见，而其他人物的轮廓可以稍微模糊一些。这张照片应该呈现出2006年数码相机所拍摄的效果，并带有类似传统打印照片那样的时间戳。
prompt_en: Generate a photorealistic image of Time Square on a saturday in Fall 2006, it's a beautiful late October day, people are busy. in focus should be a young blonde - rest can be blurred. the photo should be reminiscent of that a digital camera from 2006 would take, with a timestamp like a printed photo would have.

title: 热气腾腾的印度羊肉咖喱铁锅料理
author: 𝘬𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘺
prompt:
核心主题：
一张特写、高角度拍摄的滋滋作响的印度/巴基斯坦羊肉卡拉希（Mutton Karahi），盛放在传统的、质朴的、带有风化痕迹的黑色铁锅（卡拉希）中。肉块是鲜嫩多汁的深红棕色，闪烁着浓郁、厚重、油亮的番茄底肉汁（马萨拉）。

点缀与细节：
菜肴点缀精美，撒有切成细丝的金色姜片、新鲜切碎的翠绿香菜叶，旁边放着两根完整的鲜绿色鸟眼辣椒。表面可见细小的油滴和香料，反射着光线。

氛围与光线：
热腾腾的食物自然地升腾起缕缕白色蒸汽，营造出一种新鲜感。灯光“情绪化”且“电影感十足”，左上方有一个强烈的定向光源，在肉和酱汁上形成深邃的阴影和高光。

背景与环境：
卡拉希放置在一张深色、有纹理的质朴木桌上。背景柔和模糊（浅景深），带有温暖的泥土色调，隐约可见铜制厨具和散落的香料，营造出一种舒适、地道的厨房或餐厅氛围。

技术风格：
超现实 8K 微距摄影，使用 {"lens focal length" "100mm lens"} 镜头拍摄，专业美食造型，鲜艳色彩，高对比度，锐利纹理，电影感构图。

★关键视觉元素表
元素          描述
—主菜：  浓稠的深红棕色肉咖喱，可见油水分离。
—厨具：  老旧的黑色铸铁锅，带圆形手柄。
—配料：  新鲜姜丝、香菜和整根青辣椒。
—视觉效果： 逼真的升腾蒸汽和“闪亮”的质感。
—调色板：  深红色、焦橙色、森林绿和深木色调。
prompt_en:
Core Subject:
A close-up, high-angle shot of a sizzling Indian/Pakistani Mutton Karahi served in a traditional rustic, weathered black iron wok (karahi). The meat consists of tender, succulent cubes of dark red-brown meat, glistening with a rich, thick, oily tomato-based gravy (masala).
Garnish & Details:
The dish is beautifully garnished with thin, golden julienne-cut ginger, freshly chopped vibrant green coriander leaves, and two whole, bright green bird's eye chilies resting on the side. Fine droplets of oil and spices are visible on the surface, reflecting the light.
Atmosphere & Lighting:
Wisps of white steam rise naturally from the hot food, creating a sense of freshness. The lighting is "moody" and "cinematic," with a strong directional light source from the top-left that creates deep shadows and high-gloss highlights on the meat and sauce.
Background & Environment:
The karahi sits on a dark, textured rustic wooden table. The background is softly blurred (shallow depth of field) with warm, earthy tones, hints of copper kitchenware, and scattered spices, creating a cozy, authentic kitchen or restaurant ambiance.
Technical Style:
Ultra-realistic 8K macro photography, shot on a {"lens focal length" "100mm lens"}, professional food styling, vibrant colors, high contrast, sharp textures, and cinematic composition.

★Key visual Elements Table
Element          Description
—Main Dish:  Thick, dark red-brown meat curry with visible oil separation.
—Cookware:  Aged, black cast-iron pan with rounded handles.
—Toppings:  Fresh ginger strips, cilantro, and whole green chilies.
—Visual Effects: Realistic rising steam and "glistening" texture.
—Color Palette:  Deep reds, burnt oranges, forest greens, and dark wood tones.

title: 精致珐琅彩西湖冰箱贴设计
author: @VigoCreativeAI
prompt: 珐琅彩琉璃艺术风格，金属质感，制作一枚冰箱贴，写着"西湖·杭州 WEST LAKE"字样。冰箱贴以断桥拱形轮廓为基底外形，金色金属边框包边。画面描绘西湖经典风景：断桥残雪、湖面莲叶、楼外楼画舫、雷峰塔剪影、三潭印月石灯、粉色桃花与垂柳。左侧点缀龙井茶叶图案，右侧装饰杭绣扇面。采用珐琅彩填色工艺：湖水呈透明翠绿，金属线勾勒波纹细节。浅咖色背景，正面展示，所有元素严格控制在基底轮廓范围内，布局美观协调，产品摄影质感，8K细节
prompt_en: Enamel colored glazed art style, metallic texture, creating a fridge magnet, with the text "West Lake · Hangzhou WEST LAKE" written on it. The fridge magnet uses the arched outline of the Broken Bridge as the base shape, with a gold metal border edging. The scene depicts classic West Lake scenery: Lingering Snow on the Broken Bridge, lotus leaves on the lake surface, Louwailou painted boat, Leifeng Pagoda silhouette, Three Pools Mirroring the Moon stone lanterns, pink peach blossoms and weeping willows. Decorated with Longjing tea leaf patterns on the left side, and a Hangzhou embroidery fan surface on the right side. Using enamel filling process: the lake water is transparent emerald green, metal wires outline the ripple details. Light coffee-colored background, front view, all elements strictly controlled within the base outline, beautiful and coordinated layout, product photography texture, 8K details.

【服装】：穿着优雅的黑色天鹅绒礼服（露肩设计，突显身材曲线）；双肩裸露，姿态优雅。

title: 红番石榴汽水爆炸特效广告
author: 𝐌
prompt:
一个极具冲击力的产品爆炸视频，画面中央是一罐红色番石榴汽水，背景是纯红色摄影棚。

场景 1 — 静止 (0–3 秒)：
汽水罐在画面中央完美直立，完全静止。没有液体，没有水果，没有运动。罐子看起来是密封的，完好无损，逼真地附着着轻微的冷凝水滴。背景干净且统一为红色。灯光稳定而中性。没有颗粒，没有飞溅，没有预示效果。绝对静止保持整整 3 秒。

场景 2 — 冲击爆发 (3 秒后瞬间)：
一股猛烈的番石榴飞溅物以极快的速度从罐子后面喷发而出。飞溅物具有侵略性、突发性和冲击力——不是电影化的，不是慢动作。浓稠的红色番石榴液体向前上方爆炸，猛烈撞击罐子背面并使其明显晃动。

整颗番石榴、番石榴切片和绿叶以原始的动量向外喷射，冲破罐子周围的空白空间。液幕撕裂空气，形成尖锐的飞溅、混乱的弧线和密集的液滴。运动快速、响亮且具有爆炸性。

罐子大部分保持直立，但有物理反应——因冲击而晃动、振动并轻微移动。水果碎片和液体残片通过坠落、碰撞和在罐子周围飞溅而充满画面，占据了之前所有空白的空间。

没有优雅，没有慢动作，没有电影化的节奏。爆发感觉失控、高压且充满力量。冲击期间灯光增强，以强调液体的浓稠度、水果的质感和高速运动。最后几帧显示悬浮的液滴、坠落的水果和液体在混乱的余波中缠绕着罐子。

超逼真的物理效果、极致的速度、强烈的能量、商业级的真实感、大胆的对比、爆炸性的运动——没有电影般的柔和。
prompt_en:
A high-impact product explosion video featuring a red guava soda can centered in frame against a solid red studio background.

SCENE 1 — STILLNESS (0–3 seconds):
The soda can stands perfectly upright and completely still at the center of the frame. No liquid, no fruit, no motion. The can appears sealed, intact, and realistic with light condensation droplets. The background is clean and uniform red. Lighting is steady and neutral. No particles, no splashes, no anticipation effects. Absolute stillness is maintained for a full 3 seconds.

SCENE 2 — IMPACT BURST (instant after 3 seconds):
A violent guava splash erupts from behind the can at extreme speed. The splash is aggressive, sudden, and forceful — not cinematic, not slow motion. Thick red guava liquid explodes forward and upward, slamming into the back of the can and visibly shaking it.

Whole guavas, guava slices, and green leaves are launched outward with raw momentum, bursting through the empty space around the can. Liquid sheets tear through the air, creating sharp splashes, chaotic arcs, and dense droplets. The motion is fast, loud, and explosive.

The can remains mostly upright but reacts physically — shaking, vibrating, and slightly shifting from the impact. Fruit pieces and liquid fragments fill the frame by falling, colliding, and splashing around the can, occupying all previously empty space.

No elegance, no slow motion, no cinematic pacing. The burst feels uncontrolled, pressurized, and powerful. Lighting intensifies during the impact to emphasize liquid thickness, fruit texture, and high-speed motion. Final frames show suspended droplets, falling fruit, and liquid wrapping around the can in chaotic aftermath.

Ultra-realistic physics, extreme speed, aggressive energy, commercial-grade realism, bold contrast, explosive motion — no cinematic softness.

title: 高端时尚品牌三联画摄影提案
author: AmirMušić
prompt:
为品牌 {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"} 打造一套高端、超写实的编辑时尚摄影三联画宣传活动。

任务：

扮演一位世界级的时尚摄影师（例如 Steven Meisel、Paolo Roversi 或 Harley Weir），为 {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"} 拍摄一场具有决定性意义的形象宣传活动。您必须创作一个连贯的 3 幅编辑版面，水平堆叠（顶部、中部、底部面板）。重点在于电影般的特写镜头和纹理细节。

缪斯（AI 自主性）：

分析 {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"} 最深层的原型、美学、理念和目标受众的生活方式。仅基于此分析，自主生成该品牌的终极人类缪斯。您来决定他们的性别、年龄、独特的种族、引人注目的特征和富有魅力的姿态。这个人不是摆拍的模特；他们是品牌精神的活生生体现。

三联画叙事与构图（水平堆叠 - 特写焦点）：

这三幅堆叠的面板必须形成一个统一、亲密的视觉散文，表达品牌的精髓，并优先采用紧凑的构图。

顶部面板（强烈肖像）：电影般的紧凑头部特写，聚焦于眼睛和面部。眼神强烈，富有表现力。突出皮肤纹理和情感。

中部面板（姿态/动作）：紧凑的裁剪，聚焦于处于运动或静止状态的特定身体部位——紧握着某物的手、颈部的曲线、吸烟的嘴唇、姿态。它在不展示整个身体的情况下传达了人物的态度。

底部面板（终极纹理/符号）：极致的微距特写。独特的服装面料细节、一件珠宝、与品牌生活方式相关的象征性道具，或其环境中的抽象纹理。

造型与大胆选择（至关重要）：

突破界限。造型必须是前卫的高级时装。融入意想不到的元素，营造出一种“艺术电影”的感觉：奇特的配饰、并置的服装、道具，甚至如果符合品牌氛围，可以加入一丝刻意的荒谬感。图像必须感觉原始、昂贵且富有触感。

技术美学：

超写实主义：强烈的胶片颗粒感、高度详细的纹理（毛孔、织物编织）、真实的景深。

光线：大胆、电影化且富有戏剧性。根据品牌的 DNA，使用明暗对比、彩色滤光片、刺眼的阳光或阴郁的阴影。

色彩：精致、具有编辑感的色彩分级调色板，与 {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"} 完美和谐且相关。
prompt_en:
A high-end, hyper-realistic editorial fashion photography triptych campaign for brand: {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"}.

THE TASK:

Act as a world-class fashion photographer (e.g., Steven Meisel, Paolo Roversi, or Harley Weir) shooting a defining image campaign for {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"}. You must create a cohesive 3-panel editorial layout, stacked horizontally (top, middle, bottom panels). The focus is intensely on cinematic close-ups and textural details.

THE MUSE (AI AUTONOMY):

Analyze the deepest archetype, aesthetic, philosophy, and target audience lifestyle of {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"}. Based only on this analysis, autonomously generate the ultimate human muse for the brand. You determine their gender, age, unique ethnicity, striking features, and charismatic attitude. This person is not a model posing; they are the living embodiment of the brand's spirit.

THE TRIPTYCH NARRATIVE & COMPOSITION (HORIZONTAL STACK - CLOSE-UP FOCUS):

The three stacked panels must form a unified, intimate visual essay about the brand's essence, prioritizing tight framing.

Top Panel (The Intense Portrait): A cinematic, tight headshot focusing on the eyes and face. Intense, communicative gaze. Highlighting skin texture and emotion.

Middle Panel (The Gesture/Action): A tight crop focusing on a specific body part in motion or repose—hands clutching something, the curve of a neck, a mouth smoking a cigarette, posture. It conveys the character's attitude without showing the whole body.

Bottom Panel (The Ultimate Texture/Symbol): An extreme macro close-up. A detail of a unique garment fabric, a piece of jewelry, a symbolic prop relevant to the brand's lifestyle, or an abstract texture from their environment.

STYLING & BOLD CHOICES (CRITICAL):

Push boundaries. The styling must be avant-garde high fashion. Incorporate unexpected elements to create an "art-house" feel: weird accessories, juxtaposed garments, props, or even a touch of deliberate absurdity if it fits the brand's vibe. The image must feel raw, expensive, and tactile.

TECHNICAL AESTHETICS:

Hyper-realism: Strong film grain, highly detailed textures (pores, fabric weave), realistic depth of field.

Lighting: Bold, cinematic, and dramatic. Use chiaroscuro, colored gels, harsh sunlight, or moody shadows depending on the brand's DNA.

Color: A sophisticated, editorial color grading palette that is perfectly harmonious and relevant to {"brand name" "[BRAND NAME]"}.

title: 将任意物体重构为赛博工业机械装置
author: Gadgetify
prompt:
<instructions>
Input Variable: {"object" "[插入物体]"}（例如：运动鞋、人头骨、芝士汉堡、字母“A”）

系统指令：
将输入物体重新构想为复杂的、高性能的赛博工业装配体。

1.  解构：
    外壳：将物体的自然表皮替换为哑光黑色碳纤维和炮铜灰色聚合物。
    分段：物体并非实心。它被分割成不同的面板（类似于钢铁侠的盔甲或高端相机机身），通过可见的内六角螺栓和铆钉连接在一起。
    缝隙：在面板之间留出小缝隙，以展现内部机械结构。

2.  内部机械结构：
    管道：在原有有机血管或结构的位置，插入成束的工业电缆和编织钢软管。
    流动：这些电缆必须看起来功能齐全，将电力从中央核心输送到物体的各个末端。
    光芒（灵魂）：
        颜色：确定物体的“灵魂颜色”（例如：汉堡 = 琥珀色/橙色；头骨 = 青色/蓝色；运动鞋 = 霓虹绿）。
        光源：隐藏的 LED 灯条和霓虹灯管与电缆平行，发出强烈的内部光芒，从面板缝隙中溢出。

3.  叙事微细节（小零件）：
    比例指示器：嵌入微小的技术细节以体现比例。
        通风口：冷却风扇或进气格栅。
        文字：外壳上印有微小的白色序列号和警告标签（例如：“注意：高温”、“禁止踩踏”）。
        “城市”（可选）：如果物体足够大，微小的建筑元素（天线、平台）可以从机械底座上生长出来。

4.  视觉语法与构图：
    背景：干净的摄影棚灰色（无限曲线）。焦点完全集中在物体的轮廓上。
    灯光：
        主光：柔和的白色摄影棚灯光，以突出碳纤维编织的纹理。
        轮廓光：锐利的背光，以勾勒物体在灰色背景下的边缘。
        辉光：内部彩色 LED 必须具有柔和的“Octane Bloom”效果。

5.  渲染风格：
    美学：硬表面建模、“科技服饰”时尚、高端汽车设计。
    相机：等距或 3/4 产品拍摄角度。

输出：照片级 3D 渲染，8k，高度详细的纹理（碳纤维、拉丝金属、橡胶）。
</instructions>
prompt_en:
<instructions> 
Input Variable: {"object" "[INSERT OBJECT]"} (e.g., A Sneaker, A Human Skull, A Cheeseburger, The Letter 'A')

System Instruction:
Reimagine the Input Object as a complex, high-performance Cyber-Industrial Assembly.

1.  Deconstruction:
   The Shell: Replace the object's natural skin with Matte Black Carbon Fiber and Gunmetal Grey Polymer.
   The Segmentation: The object is not solid. It is segmented into distinct panels (like Iron Man armor or a high-end camera body), held together by visible Hex Bolts and Rivets.
   The Gaps: Between the panels, leave small gaps to reveal the internal mechanics.

2.  Internal Mechanics :
   The Piping: Where organic veins or structure would be, insert Bundled Industrial Cabling and Braided Steel Hoses.
   The Flow: These cables must look functional, routing power from a central core to the extremities of the object.
   The Glow (The Soul):
       Color: Identify the "Spirit Color" of the object (e.g., Burger = Amber/Orange; Skull = Cyan/Blue; Sneaker = Neon Green).
       Source: Hidden LED strips and neon tubes run parallel to the cables, casting a strong internal glow that spills out from the panel gaps.

3. The Narrative Micro-Detail (The Greebles):
   Scale Indicators: Embed tiny technical details to sell the scale.
       Vents: Cooling fans or intake grilles.
       Text: Tiny white serial numbers and warning labels (e.g., "CAUTION: HOT", "NO STEP") printed on the casing.
       The "City" (Optional): If the object is large enough, tiny architectural elements (antennas, platforms) can grow out of the mechanical base.

4. Visual Syntax & Composition:
   Background: Clean Studio Grey (Infinite Curve). The focus is entirely on the object's silhouette.
   Lighting:
       Key Light: Soft white studio light to highlight the texture of the carbon fiber weave.
       Rim Light: A sharp backlight to define the edge of the object against the grey background.
       Bloom: The internal colored LEDs must have a soft "Octane Bloom" effect.

5. Render Style:
   Aesthetic: Hard Surface Modeling, "Tech-Wear" Fashion, High-End Automotive Design.
   Camera: Isometric or 3/4 Product Shot angle.

Output: Photorealistic 3D Render, 8k, Highly Detailed Textures (Carbon Fiber, Brushed Metal, Rubber).
</instructions>

title: 水晶玻璃果味蛋糕静物艺术摄影
author: Latte
prompt: 创作一张奢华时尚的静物照片，呈现一块由坚硬、晶莹剔透的玻璃状材料制成的尖锐三角棱柱形蛋糕，特色水果为 [{"featured fruit" "orange"}]。使用单一统一的糖果玻璃色调，同时保留水果原始的自然色调和形态逻辑，明确排除茎和叶的重新着色，使其保持自然的绿色。透明玻璃蛋糕具有抛光的边缘、优雅的折射、清晰的高光和与实心水晶相同的内部反射。蛋糕内部，厚实饱满的无籽水果横截面呈现纯净透明的玻璃状，表面完美光滑无缝。一颗完整的、镜面抛光的半透明水晶玻璃糖果风格水果置于蛋糕顶部，另一颗则置于其旁边，所有水果（叶子除外）都共享相同的色调和材质光洁度。蛋糕置于一个带有透明水晶碎片的亮白色陶瓷盘上，配有一把香槟金色的金属叉和少量满天星点缀，背景是柔软垂坠的白色丝绸面料。构图比例均衡，负空间精致。采用柔和漫射的高端编辑灯光，保留糖果般的色彩丰富度和材质清晰度。超现实、超细节、高端美学，无文字、无排版、无标志、无水印、无图形元素，排除粗糙纹理、哑光表面、立方体、方形或圆形蛋糕、冰块、亚克力或树脂块、浑浊透明度、人物、手、面孔。
prompt_en: Create a luxury fashion-editorial still life of a sharp triangular prism cake slice made of hard crystal-clear glass-like material, with the featured fruit being [{"featured fruit" "orange"}], using a single unified candy-glass color tone while preserving the fruit’s original natural hue and form logic, explicitly excluding stems and leaves from recoloring so they retain natural green, the transparent glass cake has polished edges, elegant refraction, crisp highlights and internal reflections identical to solid crystal, inside the cake thick full-bodied seedless fruit cross-sections appear as pure clear glass with perfectly smooth seamless surfaces, one whole fruit in mirror-polished translucent crystal-glass candy style sits on top and another rests beside it, all fruit instances sharing identical color tone and material finish except leaves, arranged on a glossy white ceramic plate with clear crystal shards, a champagne-gold metallic fork and minimal baby’s-breath accents against softly draped white silk fabric, composed with balanced proportions and refined negative space, lit with soft diffused high-end editorial lighting that preserves candy-like color richness and material clarity, hyper-realistic, ultra-detailed, premium aesthetic, no text, no typography, no logo, no watermark, no graphic elements, exclude rough texture, matte surface, cube, square or round cake, ice cube, acrylic or resin block, cloudy transparency, people, hands, faces

title: 科技公司品牌重塑视觉对比：从传统到未来进化
author: SRKDAN
prompt:
一家现代科技公司的概念性品牌重塑视觉展示。
抽象的转型主题，
前后对比的视觉张力，
柔和的定向照明，克制的调色板，
自信、前瞻的基调，
精心打造，如同全球代理机构的品牌重塑案例研究。
prompt_en:
Conceptual rebrand reveal visual for a modern tech company.
Abstract transformation motifs,
before-and-after visual tension,
soft directional lighting, restrained palette,
confident, forward-looking tone,
crafted like a global agency rebrand case study.

title: 生活化产品摄影预设
author: Sravani K
prompt: {"product" "陶瓷马克杯"} 的生活方式产品摄影，置于温馨舒适的家居环境中。主打镜头 + 环境生活方式构图 + 特写纹理细节，以连贯的叙事布局呈现。自然窗光，柔和阴影，手工纹理，温暖大地色调，营造出温馨的 Etsy 风格氛围，并带有电影般的柔和感。
prompt_en: Lifestyle product photography of {"product" "ceramic mug"} styled in a warm, cozy home setting. Hero shot + ambient lifestyle frame + close-up texture detail arranged in a cohesive storytelling layout. Natural window lighting, soft shadows, handcrafted textures, warm earthy tones, inviting Etsy-style ambience with a cinematic softness.
